templates.name: AWS Backup Vault by HTTP
templates.description:
The template is designed to monitor AWS Backup vaults and jobs by HTTP via Zabbix, and it works without any external scripts.
Don't forget to read the README.md for the correct setup of the template.

You can discuss this template or leave feedback on our forum https://www.zabbix.com/forum/zabbix-suggestions-and-feedback

Generated by official Zabbix template tool "Templator"

items.name: Age
items.description: The age of the vault.

items.name: Get data
items.description:
Retrieve AWS backup vault metrics.
More information here: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/aws-backup/latest/devguide/API_BackupVaultListMember.html

items.name: Jobs: Backup
items.description: The number of backup jobs in the vault over the last `{$AWS.BACKUP_JOB.PERIOD}` day(s).

items.name: Jobs: Failed backup
items.description: The number of failed backup jobs in the vault over the last `{$AWS.BACKUP_JOB.PERIOD}` day(s).

items.name: Jobs: Copy
items.description: The number of copy jobs in the vault over the last `{$AWS.BACKUP_JOB.PERIOD}` day(s).

triggers.name: AWS Backup vault: Copy job has appeared

items.name: Jobs: Failed copy
items.description: The number of failed copy jobs in the vault over the last `{$AWS.BACKUP_JOB.PERIOD}` day(s).

items.name: Get jobs
items.description: Get a list of jobs in the vault.

items.name: Jobs: Restore
items.description: The number of restore jobs in the vault over the last `{$AWS.BACKUP_JOB.PERIOD}` day(s).

triggers.name: AWS Backup vault: Restore job has appeared

items.name: Jobs: Failed restore
items.description: The number of failed restore jobs in the vault over the last `{$AWS.BACKUP_JOB.PERIOD}` day(s).

items.name: Jobs: Size, avg
items.description:
The average size, in bytes, of a backup (recovery point).
This value can render differently depending on the resource type as AWS Backup pulls in data information from other AWS services. For example, the value returned may show a value of `0`, which may differ from the anticipated value.

items.name: Jobs: Size, max
items.description:
The maximum size, in bytes, of a backup (recovery point).
This value can render differently depending on the resource type as AWS Backup pulls in data information from other AWS services. For example, the value returned may show a value of `0`, which may differ from the anticipated value.

items.name: Jobs: Size, min
items.description:
The minimum size, in bytes, of a backup (recovery point).
This value can render differently depending on the resource type as AWS Backup pulls in data information from other AWS services. For example, the value returned may show a value of `0`, which may differ from the anticipated value.

items.name: Jobs: Total
items.description: The total number of jobs in the vault over the last `{$AWS.BACKUP_JOB.PERIOD}` day(s).

items.name: Lock date
items.description: The date and time when AWS Backup Vault Lock configuration becomes immutable, meaning it cannot be changed or deleted.

preprocessing.error_handler_params: Either the vault is not locked, or the lock date is not specified.

items.name: Lock status
items.description: Indicates whether AWS Backup Vault Lock is applied to the selected backup vault. When the vault is locked, delete and update operations on recovery points in that vault are prevented.

items.name: Lock time remain
items.description: The remaining time before AWS Backup Vault Lock configuration becomes immutable, meaning it cannot be changed or deleted.

preprocessing.error_handler_params: Either the vault is not locked, or the lock date is not specified.

items.name: Recovery points
items.description: The total number of recovery points in the backup vault.

items.name: Retention period, max
items.description: The maximum retention period that the vault retains its recovery points.

preprocessing.error_handler_params: The vault does not have the maximum retention period set.

items.name: Retention period, min
items.description: The minimum retention period that the vault retains its recovery points.

preprocessing.error_handler_params: The vault does not have the minimum retention period set.

items.name: State
items.description:
The current state of the backup vault.
Possible values are:
- Unknown
- Creating
- Available
- Failed

item_prototypes.name: Job state [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.RESOURCE_NAME}][{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.ID}]
item_prototypes.description:
The state of the job.
Possible values are:
- Unknown
- Created
- Pending
- Running
- Aborting
- Aborted
- Completed
- Failed
- Expired
- Partial

trigger_prototypes.name: AWS Backup vault: Job failed [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.ID}]
trigger_prototypes.event_name: AWS Backup vault: Job type [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.TYPE}] for [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.RESOURCE_NAME}] with ID [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.ID}] has failed.

trigger_prototypes.name: AWS Backup vault: Job has been aborted [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.ID}]
trigger_prototypes.event_name: AWS Backup vault: Job type [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.TYPE}] for [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.RESOURCE_NAME}] with ID [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.ID}] has been aborted.

trigger_prototypes.name: AWS Backup vault: Job has expired [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.ID}]
trigger_prototypes.event_name: AWS Backup vault: Job type [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.TYPE}] for [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.RESOURCE_NAME}] with ID [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.ID}] has expired.

trigger_prototypes.name: AWS Backup vault: Job is in an unknown state [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.ID}]
trigger_prototypes.event_name: AWS Backup vault: Job type [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.TYPE}] for [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.RESOURCE_NAME}] with ID [{#AWS.BACKUP_JOB.ID}] is in an unknown state.

config.label: Access key ID
config.description: Access keys are long-term credentials for an IAM user.

macros.description: ARN assume role; add when using the `assume_role` authorization method.

config.label: ARN assume role
config.description: The ARN of the role to assume when using the assume_role authorization method.

macros.description: Add when using the `assume_role` through instance metadata or environment authorization method. Possible values: `false`, `true`.

config.label: Assume Role Metadata Authorization
config.description: Chose `True` when use instance metadata service to retrieve role credentials.

macros.description: The number of days over which to retrieve backup jobs.

config.label: Job discovery period
config.description: The number of days over which to retrieve backup jobs. No less than 1.

macros.description: Filter of discoverable jobs by resource name.

config.label: Job filter by resource name
config.description: Filter of discoverable jobs by resource name.

macros.description: Filter to exclude discovered jobs by resource name.

config.description: Filter to exclude discoverable jobs by resource name.

config.description: Filter of discoverable jobs by resource type.

macros.description: Filter to exclude discovered jobs by resource type.

config.label: Job filter by resource type (exclude)
config.description: Filter to exclude discoverable jobs by resource type.

macros.description: Filter of discoverable jobs by state.

config.description: Filter of discoverable jobs by state.

macros.description: Filter to exclude discovered jobs by state.

config.description: Filter to exclude discoverable jobs by state.

config.label: API response timeout
config.description: Timeout for API responses in seconds.

macros.description: Sets the HTTP proxy value. If this macro is empty, no proxy is used.

config.label: HTTP Proxy
config.description: HTTP proxy to use for requests.

config.label: AWS Region
config.description: The AWS region where your backup vaults are located.

config.label: Secret access key
config.description: Secret access key can be retrieved only at the time you create it.

macros.description: Region used in assume role request.
